base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of gift_mayor_house — a tile from 1989 simcity. Mayor's House — gift unlocked at 2,000 pop. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mayor's House — gift unlocked at 2,000 pop
